name: Iron Gate — AI Data Governance
shortDescription: Protect sensitive data in AI prompts. Real-time PII scanning and compliance for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and more.
detailedDescription:
Iron Gate automatically detects and protects sensitive information before it reaches AI tools like ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and Microsoft Copilot.

🛡️ KEY FEATURES:

• Real-time PII Detection — Scans every prompt for emails, SSNs, credit cards, API keys, medical records, and 30+ entity types using local-first regex detection.

• Smart Pseudonymization — Replaces sensitive data with realistic pseudonyms so AI can still provide useful responses. De-pseudonymizes AI responses automatically.

• Compliance Enforcement — Built-in support for HIPAA, PCI-DSS, SOC 2, GDPR, CCPA, ITAR, and GLBA frameworks. Automatically blocks entity types required by your compliance framework.

• Enterprise Controls — Department-level policies, SCIM provisioning, MDM deployment, SIEM integration, and SSO support.

• Coaching Mode — Inline tooltips explain why data was flagged, with options to dismiss false positives and provide feedback.

• Audit Trail — Every detection event is logged with metadata (never raw PII) for compliance reporting and incident response.

• Zero Raw Data Transmission — All detection happens locally in your browser. Only metadata (entity types, scores, actions) is sent to the Iron Gate API.

🔒 SUPPORTED AI TOOLS:
• ChatGPT (chatgpt.com)
• Claude (claude.ai)
• Google Gemini (gemini.google.com)
• Microsoft Copilot (copilot.microsoft.com)
• DeepSeek, Poe, Perplexity, You.com, HuggingChat, Groq

🏢 BUILT FOR ENTERPRISE:
Iron Gate is designed for organizations that need to enable AI adoption while maintaining data governance. Features include centralized admin dashboard, per-department policies, compliance reporting, and automated incident narratives.

📊 HOW IT WORKS:
1. You type a prompt in any supported AI tool
2. Iron Gate scans the text locally for sensitive entities
3. Detected entities are pseudonymized before sending
4. AI responds using pseudonyms
5. Iron Gate de-pseudonymizes the response so you see real names
6. An audit event is logged (metadata only)

No data leaves your browser unprotected. Iron Gate acts as a transparent privacy layer between you and AI.
singlePurpose: Detects and protects sensitive data (PII, credentials, financial info) in AI tool prompts by scanning locally and pseudonymizing before transmission.

permissionJustifications.activeTab: Required to access the current tab's content when the user is on a supported AI tool page, so Iron Gate can scan input fields for sensitive data.
permissionJustifications.storage: Stores user preferences, encrypted pseudonym reverse maps, cached compliance policies, and suppression rules.
permissionJustifications.sidePanel: Displays the Iron Gate dashboard showing detection activity, sensitivity scores, and compliance status.
permissionJustifications.alarms: Periodically syncs compliance policies, suppression rules, and organization configuration from the Iron Gate API.
permissionJustifications.scripting: Injects content scripts into supported AI tool pages to intercept and scan user prompts before submission.
permissionJustifications.webNavigation: Detects when the user navigates to a supported AI tool to activate Iron Gate's protection.
permissionJustifications.notifications: Alerts users when high-sensitivity data is detected in their AI prompts.

hostPermissionJustifications.chatgpt.com: Scans ChatGPT input for sensitive data and pseudonymizes before sending.
hostPermissionJustifications.chat.openai.com: Legacy ChatGPT domain — same functionality as chatgpt.com.
hostPermissionJustifications.claude.ai: Scans Claude AI input for sensitive data and pseudonymizes before sending.
hostPermissionJustifications.gemini.google.com: Scans Google Gemini input for sensitive data and pseudonymizes before sending.
hostPermissionJustifications.irongate-api.onrender.com: Iron Gate's own API endpoint for audit logging (metadata only) and configuration sync.

collectedData.purpose: Identifying which AI tool the user is on to activate protection
Detecting sensitive entities in AI prompts (processed locally)

transmittedData.purpose: Compliance logging — entity types, sensitivity scores, actions taken
